Master Direction on Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio of Commercial Banks

RBI/2024-25/123 DBR.ABC.No.123/456.789.123/2024-25

15 January 2024

In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 21 and Section 35A of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India hereby issues the following Master Direction.

1. Short Title and Commencement - This Master Direction shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio of Commercial Banks) Directions, 2024. It shall come into force with effect from April 1, 2025.

2. Classification of Investments - All investments shall be classified into three categories: (i) Held to Maturity (HTM), (ii) Available for Sale (AFS), and (iii) Held for Trading (HFT).

3. Valuation Norms - Banks shall follow the valuation norms as prescribed in this Master Direction for each category of investments.
